name: Stirling PDF
description: Local PDF manipulation toolbox — merge, split, OCR, convert, compress, and 50+ other operations in-browser
author: Crow
notes: Stirling PDF has no public API suitable for MCP. This bundle ships a panel with an iframe to the web UI and a tiny MCP server with a status check. Stirling 2.x includes a login form by default; create the admin account on first visit. Bound to 127.0.0.1 only.
